name: html-preview
description: A universal previewer for VS Code. Preview HTML, XML, Markdown, CSV, PDFs, images, and videos with visual inspectors, real-time code sync, devtools docking, and responsive viewport simulator.

explorer/context.when: resourceLangId == html || resourceLangId == markdown || resourceLangId == xml || resourceExtname == .csv || resourceExtname == .ssv || resourceExtname == .png || resourceExtname == .jpg || resourceExtname == .jpeg || resourceExtname == .webp || resourceExtname == .gif || resourceExtname == .svg || resourceExtname == .mp4 || resourceExtname == .webm || resourceExtname == .pdf

editor/context.when: editorLangId == html || editorLangId == markdown || editorLangId == xml || editorLangId == csv || editorHasSelection
